name: TA Greenland (TravelCenters of America)
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop at I-95 Exit 3 (Exit 3B southbound) with multiple diesel lanes, a 24-hour Country Pride restaurant, and a CAT Scale. Offers roughly 76 truck parking spaces.

name: Exit 3 Travel Stop
description: Independent Sunoco-branded travel stop off I-95 Exit 3 with three diesel lanes, truck/overnight/hazmat parking, a convenience store and car wash.

name: Hanscom's Truck Stop North (Portsmouth Truck Stop)
description: Long-running independent truck stop on the US-1 Bypass near I-95 Exit 5 with fuel lanes, convenience store, deli/fast food, trucker store and drivers' lounge.

name: Hanscom's Truck Stop South
description: Independent truck stop on the US-1 Bypass accessible from I-95 Exits 5/7, offering fuel, convenience items, deli/food and a drivers' lounge.

name: CAT Scale at TA Greenland
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Greenland travel center off I-95 Exit 3; the only CAT Scale on the New Hampshire I-95 corridor.

name: Seabrook Tire Inc.
description: Established tire dealer and service center on US-1 in Seabrook near I-95 Exit 1, listed as a Bridgestone commercial truck/semi/OTR tire dealer.

name: National Wrecker Service
description: 24/7 heavy-duty truck, trailer and reefer towing, recovery and mobile tire/roadside repair serving the Portsmouth/Seacoast I-95 corridor; in operation since 1974.

name: Hampton I-95 Weigh / Inspection Station
address: I-95 at the Hampton mainline toll plaza
description: Twin NH State Police commercial-vehicle weigh/inspection station serving northbound and southbound I-95 traffic at the Hampton toll plaza.

name: NH Liquor & Wine Outlet / Rest Area - Hampton Southbound
address: I-95 Southbound, Hampton (near the Hampton tolls)
description: State-run rest area and NH Liquor & Wine Outlet on the southbound side of I-95 in Hampton with restrooms and a large paved lot commonly used for truck/vehicle stops. (Redevelopment to add fuel and food services is planned but not yet built.)

name: NH Liquor & Wine Outlet / Rest Area - Hampton Northbound
address: I-95 Northbound, Hampton (near the Hampton tolls)
description: State-run rest area and NH Liquor & Wine Outlet on the northbound side of I-95 in Hampton with restrooms and parking. (A future welcome-center redevelopment with fuel is planned but not yet operational.)
